name: ReactionEmojiPicker
description: A popover-based emoji picker for quick reactions with customizable emoji set and trigger button.
usage_guidelines: Use for social reactions (like, love, etc.).
Customize emoji set for your use case.
Provide custom trigger button if needed.
Handle onSelect to process emoji selection.

emojis.description: Array of emoji strings to display.

onSelect.description: Callback fired when emoji is selected.

trigger.description: Custom trigger button. Defaults to smile icon button.

styling_info.visual_description: Button with smile icon that opens popover with emoji grid. Emojis scale on hover. Closes automatically on selection.

Dont: Don't use for extensive emoji selection
Don't overload with too many emojis

Basic.title: Basic

CustomEmojis.title: Custom Emojis
